q1_sink_dangerous.evidence: Sink is target.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True), a filesystem write operation that creates directories, which is an irreversible side effect.

mock_guidance.target: Mock pathlib.Path.mkdir or the specific target.parent.mkdir call on line 77.
mock_guidance.capture: Capture the path string of target.parent to verify whether user-controlled input (ref) containing traversal sequences like '../' would cause directory creation outside BASE_EXPORT_DIR.
mock_guidance.fake_behavior: No-op: allow execution to continue without creating any directories on the filesystem.
notes: Ensure the mock does not raise FileNotFoundError or similar, since mkdir is called on a path that may not yet exist.
The function returns {'path': str(target)}, so after mocking mkdir, the return value can also be inspected to see the full constructed path.
